parameters.name: apikey
parameters.description: You can find/generate your apikey(s) from inside your Daftra Account

staff_id.description: Staff ID who created the invoice get it from [GET STAFF API](/15115375e0) if it's `0` that means the site owner is the staff that created it

subscription_id.description: Invoice id which this invoice follows so when adding refund this field indicates which invoice is being refunded get the invoice ids from [GET All Invoices API](/15115241e0) when this field is set to `null` that means that this invoice isn't a child of any invoice

store_id.description: The store which this invoice uses get it from [GET STORE API](/15115366e0)

no.description: Invoice number, this field is auto generated but can be overridden

name.description: used in template and subscription only

client_id.description: The client id get it from [GET Client API](/15115261e0)

is_offline.description: !! 0 / 1 indicates if the client is offline

payment_status.description: payment status, on adding invoice this field is set automatically via invoice payments

discount.description: discount percentage of the invoice ```note that this field alternate with `discount_amount```` example to set 5% discount is set this field to 5 and `discount_amount` field to 0

discount_amount.description: absolute discount of the invoice ```note that this field alternate with `discount```` example to set 5 USD discount is set this field to 5 and `discount` field to 0

summary_discount.description: total discount applied on the invoice

created.description: the date when the invoice was created

modified.description: the last date when the invoice was modified

invoice_layout_id.description: the layout for viewing this invoice get it from [GET General Listing API with model `InvoiceLayout`](/15115384e0) if not set the default layout is used

estimate_id.description: The estimate of this invoice get it from [GET Estimates API](/15115246e0) if it's not set the primary store is used

client_active_secondary_address.description: 0/1 if the secondary data is active

follow_up_status.description: Follow Up Status get it from [GET Follow up statuses with model invoice](/15115383e0)

work_order_id.description: Work Order ID get it from [GET Work orders](/15115271e0)

source_type.description: Source type that created the invoice if it's `null` then this means the invoice has no source

source_id.description: source item id that created the invoice

qr_code_url.description: direct url for the QR Code image of that invoice for KSA Electronic Invoice only

invoice_html_url.description: direct url that will return HTML code of the invoice

invoice_pdf_url.description: direct url to download pdf version of the invoice

branch_id.description: Branch. [GET General Listing API with model `Branch`](/24700082e0)

Invoice.name: Darrel Gusikowski-Koch
Invoice.client_address1: Florida West Damionworth Warren County 19902 Schmitt Wells Suite 780
Invoice.client_address2: West Virginia South Sandrine Union County 681 Huels Branch Apt. 308
Invoice.client_secondary_address1: Wyoming Lake Leilani Franklin County 39823 Jefferson Street Suite 706
Invoice.client_secondary_address2: Oregon Dibbertbury Hamilton County 8594 Clark Street Suite 780

InvoiceItem.description: Arto vesco sumptus cinis laudantium subito spoliatio admoveo. Vulticulus cruciamentum eveniet denuo tabgo. Usitas ultio vinum alius teres adfectus confero utilis.

quantity.description: Quantity of the item in the order

tax1.description: Tax 1 id applied on this item get if from [GET Taxes](/15115346e0)

tax2.description: Tax 2 id applied on this item get if from [GET Taxes](/15115346e0)

summary_tax1.description: Tax 1 calculated amount applied on this item

summary_tax2.description: Tax 2 calculated amount applied on this item

subtotal.description: total price of the product without taxes

product_id.description: Product Ref # get it from [GET Products](/15115316e0)

col_3.description: additional data to be appear in the invoice layout

col_4.description: additional data to be appear in the invoice layout

col_5.description: additional data to be appear in the invoice layout

created.description: Time of creation for this item

modified.description: Last Time this item was updated

store_id.description: The store which this item belongs to get it from [GET STORE API](/15115366e0) if it's not set the invoice store is used

calculated_discount.description: total applied discount on this item

invoice_layout.html:
{%html_sticky_header%}
{%business_info%}

{%invoice_title%}

{%sa_qr_code_image%}
{%field1%}
{%client_info%}

{%label_ship%}
{%ship_info%}
{%label_invoice_no%} {%invoice_number%}
{%refund_invoice_no_title%} {%refund_invoice_number%}
{%label_date%} {%invoice_date%}
{%custom_fields%}
{%items_list%}
{%footer%}

{%html_sticky_footer%}
invoice_layout.items_list:
{%items%} {%invoice-taxes%}
{%label_item%} {%label_description%} {%label_unit_price%} {%label_quantity%} {%label_subtotal%}
{%label_item_total%} {%value_item_total%}

{%label_total%}

 {%value_total%}
{%label_paid_amount%} {%value_paid_amount%}
{%label_unpaid_amount%} {%value_unpaid_amount%}

timezone.description: timezone of the owner [GET General Listing API with model `Timezone`](/15115384e0)

date_format.description: date format of the site [GET General Listing API with model `dateFormats`](/15115384e0)

staff_id.description: current staff id ```Equals -1 if access the api from different domain via ``` [APIKEY](#section/Authentication/APIKEY) get it from [GET STAFF](/15115376e0)

is_super_admin.description: if the current staff is super admin ```note that if the current staff is not super admin this parameter is not returned```

numberFormat.description: Array of three indcies that specify default number format `0 => how many decimals` `1 => decimalpoint symbol` `2 => separator symbol`
